ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AION-TECH SOLUTIONS LIMITED has made a further cash investment of Rs. 60 lakhs, bringing its total equity commitment in its wholly-owned subsidiary, ROQIT GREENFLEET DIGITAL SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED, to Rs. 10.40 crore. This significant capital infusion supports ROQIT, an early-stage zero-emission fleet technology company incorporated in late 2024, for operational and product development expenses. A key red flag is the substantial cumulative investment compared to the subsidiary's minimal revenue generation of Rs. 18.7 lakhs in FY26, indicating a high cash burn and slow commercialization progress for this unproven venture.
